headline: ADP (NASDAQ:ADP) Beats Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
summary: Payroll and HR services provider Automatic Data Processing (NASDAQ:ADP) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7% year on year to $5.94 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.37 per share was 2.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: ADP Reports Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results
summary: ADP (Nasdaq: ADP), a global leader in HR and payroll solutions, today announced its third quarter fiscal 2026 financial results along with its revised fiscal 2026 outlook through an earnings release available on the company's website at investors.adp.com/events-and-presentations. This earnings release will also be furnished to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on a Current Report on Form 8-K and available at sec.gov.
